prompt:
RENDER PHASE — Mochaccino (read .claude/skills/comprehend-visualise/SKILL.md + appydave-plugins/appydave/skills/mochaccino/references/usage-patterns.md first). This is a Mochaccino visual-design job; the comprehension DATA already exists at experiments/watchtower-engine/proof/cortex/data.json (+ digest.md) — pinned to cortex @ commit a129a5d50ba8a140c288b6f2eb03ddadcee873a9 (M4). POSITIONING IS EVERYTHING (memory 'position-for-audience-not-structure'): audience = David's YouTube viewers asking 'HOW DOES A BRAIN ACTUALLY WORK?'. cortex is just the worked example. NEVER frame around packages/monorepo/deps — frame around the brain CONCEPT. DATA-FIRST/MVC (memory 'structure-first-then-render'): first reframe the structural comprehension into AUDIENCE-CONCEPT data (Peter's job) in .mochaccino/data/*.json, THEN render (Mocha); index.html ALWAYS fetches its data/NN-*.json, never inlines.

DELIVER FOUR coherent Mochaccino designs in the EXISTING dark-factory .mochaccino/ workspace (server already serving it on :7422 — do NOT start a new port; regenerate files, curl to verify).

(0) NEW HERO — designs/06-brain-anatomy/ — 'Anatomy of a Brain' — the overview that ties the whole brain into ONE picture and is the YouTube hero. It MUST show what the 3 fragments individually miss: (a) YOU FEED IT — conversations/notes/files go IN (the ingest mouth); (b) FOUR KINDS OF MEMORY as brain regions — Episodic=timeline (what happened, when) · Semantic/knowledge-graph=entity-graph (who & what it knows, even contradictions) · Associative=vectors (recall by MEANING not keywords) · Housekeeping=sleep (consolidation); (c) IT RECALLS BY MEANING — the recall path lighting the regions; (d) IT SLEEPS to consolidate; (e) SWAPPABLE ORGANS — the 3 seams Storage / Embedding / LLM drawn as parts you can swap WITHOUT touching the brain (this is cortex's whole thesis and NONE of the existing fragments show it). The hero links out to the 3 fragments as drill-downs.

(1-3) REGENERATE the 3 fragments to MATCH the hero's visual language + cross-link back to it, as a coherent set: designs/02-brain-remembers/ ('How a brain remembers & recalls', lifecycle-flow) · designs/03-four-memories/ ('A brain has four kinds of memory', card-grid) · designs/04-brain-sleeps/ ('The brain that sleeps', the sleep cycle decay→tag→merge→link→tier). Reframe their data too; keep provenance.

HARD RULES (Mochaccino): Orient strip atop each (why/who/what-question); light-mode primary, AppyDave brand (brown #342d2d, gold #ccba9d, yellow #ffde59; fonts Bebas Neue / Oswald / Roboto); every design's meta.source = the cortex path + commit_sha from data.json (provenance for refresh — do NOT lose it). Regenerate designs/index.html gallery: GROUP the cortex cluster together with the hero (06) FIRST, then 02/03/04 as its drill-downs; keep 01-session-journey and 05-dark-factory. Verify all four + gallery over http on :7422 with curl.

Report ONE line: gallery URL + the 4 design names (hero first). Then complete run-next-workflow bookkeeping (run record + move to done/ + reports/ handback).

args.label: cortex-brain-v2
args.subject: how does a brain actually work
